sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18635" key="a)xalke/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀχαλκ-έω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">χαλκοῦς</etym>) <sense id="n18635.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be penniless,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.154</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
